version_description: Smooth R&B, neo-soul song, released in 2023.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
transcribed from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vYa3ak-3p60

I chose Bb major as key, although the root of this song is clearly Eb.
So the scale of this song is like the Bb major scale but starting
at Eb, which makes it a Eb lydian scale, IMO.

At the end of Post-Chorus "Ebmaj9 Ebmaj13" is like
playing Bb-chord (right hand) over a Eb-Chord (left hand) and then
mixing the F-chord to it (right hand) while holding the sustain pedal.


Tempo = 120 BPM
-----------------------------------------------------------------

[Intro]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm9[/ch]
             Mm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]
        Oh[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
The smell of your perfume[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7/F[/ch]
I thought I was immune[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Lookin' around this room[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm9[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Can't help but see the traces of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
This moment is surreal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I can't put into words how I feel[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7/F[/ch]
Twin[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7/F[/ch]
Where have you been?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Nobody knows me like you do (Nobody)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F6/G[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Nobody gon' love me quite like you (Nobody, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Can't even deny it, every time I try it[/tab]
[tab][ch]F6/G[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
One look in my eyes, you know I'm lyin', lyin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Body to body, skin to skin (I'm never gon' love like this)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I'm never gon' love like this again (Again, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
You were made for me (Just for me)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Said you were made for me (Only for me, yeah, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7/F[/ch]
Think you were made for me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Oh yeah, you were made for me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]
It ain't every day[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F/G[/ch]
That I get in my feelings this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I knew it was rare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm9[/ch]                            [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
'Cause before you, I never did care[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Don't know what I would do[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
If I had to go on without you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7/F[/ch]
Twin[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7/F[/ch]
Where have you been?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Nobody knows me like you do (Nobody)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]    [ch]Bb/G[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Nobody gon' love me quite like you (Nobody, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Can't even deny it, every time I try it[/tab]
[tab][ch]F6/G[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
One look in my eyes, you know I'm lyin', lyin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Body to body, skin to skin (I'm never gon' love like this)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I'm never gon' love like this again (Again, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
You were made for me (Just for me)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Said you were made for me (Only for me, yeah, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7/F[/ch]
Think you were made for me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Oh yeah, you were made for me[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb/Eb[/ch]   [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Made    for     me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/Eb[/ch]   [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Made    for     me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Made    for     me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj13[/ch]
Just for me, mm[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
(fade)[/tab]
